zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Moels 1st Baron Moels於1269年1月3日出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Roger DeMoels31歲，母親Alice Prouz-41歲。他於大約1288年與Maude de Grey在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年5月20日在英國薩默塞特文卡頓享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Moels 1st Baron Moels于1269年1月3日出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Roger DeMoels31岁，母亲Alice Prouz-41岁。他于大约1288年与Maude de Grey在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1310年5月20日在英国薩默塞特文卡頓享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Moels 1st Baron Moels was born on 3 January 1269, in Somerset, England, his father, Roger DeMoels, was 31 and his mother, Alice Prouz, was -41. He married Maude de Grey about 1288, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 20 May 1310, in Wincanton, Somerset, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Moels 1st Baron Moels est né le 3 janvier 1269, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Roger DeMoels, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Prouz, avait -41 ans. Il a épousé Maude de Grey environ 1288, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1310, à Wincanton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Moels 1st Baron Moels am 3. Januar 1269 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger DeMoels 31 und seine Mutter Alice Prouz -41. Er hat um 1288 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Maude de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Mai 1310 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Wincanton, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Moels 1st Baron Moels è nato il il 3 gennaio 1269 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Roger DeMoels, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice Prouz, aveva -41 anni. Lui sposato Maude de Grey circa 1288, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 20 maggio 1310, nel Wincanton, Somerset, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Moels 1st Baron Moelsが1269年1月3日にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Roger DeMoelsは31歳，母Alice Prouzは-41歳であった。約1288年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでMaude de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年5月20日にイギリスソメルセトウィンカントンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Moels 1st Baron Moels(이)가 1269년 1월 3일 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger DeMoels(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Prouz(은)는 -41세였다. 그는 대략 1288년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Maude de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 5월 20일 영국 서머세트 윈캔턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 January 1269–20 May 1310: 3 de janeiro de 1269–20 de maio de 1310
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Moels 1st Baron Moels nasceu em 3 de janeiro de 1269, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger DeMoels, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Prouz, tinha -41 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude de Grey aproximadamente 1288, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1310, em Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Moels 1st Baron Moels родился 3 января 1269 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger DeMoels было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Prouz, -41. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude de Grey около 1288 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 20 мая 1310 г. в местности винкантон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.3 January 1269–20 May 1310: 3 de enero de 1269–20 de mayo de 1310
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Moels 1st Baron Moels nació el 3 de enero de 1269, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger DeMoels, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Prouz, tenía -41 años. Se casó con Maude de Grey aproximadamente 1288, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1310, en Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
